sections.paragraph:
and זֶכֶר ( Exo 17:14 Isa 26:14 Pro 10:7, where however other copies have Tzere, see J. H. Michaëlis, Nott. Crit.), with suff. זִכְרִי m.

(1) remembrance (Andenken), Arab. ذِكْرُ. Exo 17:14, “I will blot out the memory of Amalek;” Deu 25:19 32:26 Psa 9:7 34:17 109:15 , etc.

(2) a name by which any one is remembered, i.q. שֵׁם. Exo 3:15, זֶה־שְּׁמִי לְעֹולָם וְזֶה זִכְרִי לְדֹר דֹּר “this is my name for ever, and thus ye shall name me [lit. this is my memorial] through all generations;” Psa 30:5, הֹודוּ לְזֵכֶר קָדְשֹׁו “Praise ye his holy name” [“his holy memorial”], Hos 12:6.

(3) praise, celebration; Psa 6:6 102:13 (ذِكْرُ).

[(4) Zacher, pr.n. of a man, 1Ch 8:31.]
